description_long: This hammer features a robust, rectangular head with ornate, embossed patterns on its broad faces, highlighted by deep red bands that accentuate its decorative and functional design. The head appears to be made of a metallic material, possibly brass or bronze, with a slightly aged, matte finish. The handle is long, straight, and tapers slightly toward the end, constructed from the same metallic material and segmented by subtle ridges for grip. The striking faces of the hammer are flat and wide, suitable for delivering powerful blows, while the sides of the head display intricate relief work. The overall color palette consists of gold-bronze tones with prominent red accents, giving the hammer a ceremonial or prestigious appearance. There are no visible signs of wear, branding, or additional attachments, and the object appears solid and well-crafted.
description: A decorative, gold-bronze hammer with a rectangular, embossed head and red accent bands, featuring a long, straight handle. The design is ornate and solid, with no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the hammer, ornate head with embossed patterns, and red accent bands.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the flat striking face and the geometric, raised detail at the center of the head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the handle and decorative head.
description_view_3: View from the handle end, showing the tapered handle and the rear face of the hammer head with its central raised detail.
attribute_handle_type: Straight metallic handle with subtle ridges, smooth surface, and a slight taper toward the end; no visible ergonomic or grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledge-type head with flat striking faces, ornate embossed patterns on the sides, and red accent bands; no claws or peens.
